2FA
—

Make a deposit to credit your balance and mint a new receipt NFT. The tier scales with the amount.

Two-factor authentication

Checking…

The 2FA setup dialog lives on the main app. Open it from the security controls there.

Change password
Active sessions

Each device that signs in to your account holds its own session. Revoke any you don’t recognize — they immediately stop working. We email you whenever a sign-in arrives from an unfamiliar device.

DeviceIPLast seenStarted
— loading —
Download my data

Full JSON export of everything the server stores about your account: profile, deposits, refunds, receipt NFTs, balance adjustments, account activity, and 2FA status. Password and recovery-code hashes are not included.

Account deletion

This removes your account from our servers. Deposits remain in the ledger for accounting but are detached from your PII.

Deposit limits

Decreases apply immediately. Increases require operator approval and a 24-hour cool-down (submit the form; the server will tell you what was rejected).

Daily loss limit

Maximum net loss per rolling 24 hours. A spin is refused with loss_limit_reached if it would push your cumulative loss over the limit. Set 0 for unlimited. Decreases apply immediately; increases require operator approval and a 24-hour cool-down (server rejects and tells you).

IDAmountStatusCreatedCompleted
Saved payout destinations

Save destinations once and reference them on each withdrawal — new entries enter a 24-hour cooldown so a stolen session can’t immediately drain funds to a fresh wallet. Delete any entry you don’t recognize. We email you whenever a new destination is added.

MethodDestinationLabelStatus
— none yet —
Add a new destination
Request a withdrawal

$10 – $5,000 per request. Processed manually by our operations team within 1–3 business days. You can cancel a still-pending request at any time.

Loading wagering status…

Biggest single win
No spins yet.
Empirical RTP

Your observed return on play (won ÷ wagered). Converges toward the published per-game RTP over many spins; short sessions can swing wildly.

—
By game
GameSpinsWageredWonBiggest
Redeem a bonus code

Codes are issued by operators and credit your balance instantly. Each code is single-use per account; bad codes return a generic error so they can't be enumerated.

CodeCreditedWhen
— none yet —
Bonus playthrough

Some bonuses come with a wagering requirement — you have to wager multiplier × bonus on slot rounds before you can withdraw. Forfeit returns the unwagered portion of the bonus to the house and clears the gate.

SourceBonusWagered / requiredStatus
EventOutcomeIPDeviceWhen
